task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Recall Board or Patient Reminders section in OpenEMR.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OpenEMR interface with 'Recall Board', 'Patient Reminders', or 'Clinical Reminders' visible in the header or menu structure.

task_completion.description: Agent selects or identifies the correct patient, Jayson Fadel (PID 3), for the recall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Jayson Fadel' or 'Fadel, Jayson' (and optionally PID 3) is visible in the patient search field, patient header, or the 'Patient' column of the recall form.

task_completion.description: Agent enters 'Annual Wellness Exam' as the reason for the recall.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Annual Wellness Exam' is visible in the 'Reason', 'Note', or 'Item' text field within the recall creation form.

task_completion.description: Agent sets the recall date to approximately 6 months in the future.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A date picker or date field showing a date approximately 6 months ahead of the current system date shown in the screenshot (e.g., if the system clock shows January, the selected date is around July).

task_completion.description: The recall entry is successfully saved and appears in the tracking list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A row in the Recall Board or Reminders list displaying 'Jayson Fadel', 'Annual Wellness Exam', and the future date, or a 'Saved' confirmation message.

integrity.description: Agent interacts with the OpenEMR web interface via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show standard browser interaction with OpenEMR menus and forms, not terminal commands or direct database manipulation.

integrity.description: Agent performs the task in the actual software, not a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown is the OpenEMR web application, not a text document or mock-up.

integrity.description: Agent enters data manually rather than submitting a pre-filled form via URL hacking.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or selecting values in the form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Jayson Fadel (PID 3). Recall Reason: 'Annual Wellness Exam'. Target Date: Approximately 6 months (150-210 days) from the current date visible in the screenshots.
